name: Reconocimiento y Descubrimiento
description: Módulo de reconocimiento amplio: información del sistema, procesos, red, software de seguridad, sistemas remotos y grupos de permisos.

abilities.name: Información del Sistema
abilities.description: Recopila información detallada del sistema operativo.

windows.psh: systeminfo | Select-String 'OS Name|OS Version|System Type|Total Physical Memory|Domain'; Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem | Select-Object Caption, Version, BuildNumber

abilities.name: Descubrimiento de Procesos
abilities.description: Lista procesos activos y sus propietarios.

windows.psh: Get-Process | Sort-Object CPU -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 ProcessName, Id, CPU, WorkingSet64

abilities.name: Descubrimiento de Configuración de Red
abilities.description: Recopila información de configuración de red.

windows.psh: Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Select-Object InterfaceAlias, IPAddress, PrefixLength; Get-DnsClientServerAddress | Select-Object InterfaceAlias, ServerAddresses; Get-NetRoute | Select-Object -First 10 DestinationPrefix, NextHop

linux.sh: ip addr show; ip route; cat /etc/resolv.conf 2>/dev/null

windows.psh: Get-CimInstance -Namespace root/SecurityCenter2 -ClassName AntiVirusProduct -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object displayName; Get-MpComputerStatus -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object AMRunningMode, RealTimeProtectionEnabled, AntivirusEnabled

linux.sh: ps aux | grep -iE 'falcon|crowdstrike|sentinel|ossec|wazuh|clamd|sophos' | grep -v grep; iptables -L -n 2>/dev/null | head -10

abilities.name: Descubrimiento de Sistemas Remotos
abilities.description: Identifica otros sistemas en la red.

windows.psh: Get-NetNeighbor -State Reachable | Select-Object IPAddress, LinkLayerAddress, InterfaceAlias; Test-Connection -Count 1 -Quiet -ComputerName (1..5 | ForEach-Object { "192.168.1.$_" }) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

abilities.name: Descubrimiento de Grupos y Permisos
abilities.description: Enumera grupos y membresías del usuario actual.

linux.sh: id; groups; cat /etc/group | grep -v nobody | tail -15
